title: Skeleton Knight in Another World
sourceNotes: Single-cour TV anime (S1, 12 episodes, 2022) from Studio Kai. The printed source is the light novel (AniList 87239, ongoing), but this mapping uses the ongoing manga adaptation (AniList 98900) because its chapters are numbered continuously and the community "where to start reading" boundary lands cleanly at manga chapter 21 (Volume 5). The anime adapts manga chapters 1-20 (manga volumes 1-4), equivalent to light novel volumes 1-3; readers continue at manga ch. 21 / LN vol. 4. Chapter ranges are volume-aligned and approximate (~1.7 chapters per episode, some minor LN arcs cut). Manga ongoing (current ch. 72, vol. 15). A 12-episode Season 2 began airing July 2026 (AniList 185542) and is not covered here.
